senses.definition_en: to successfully complete something or reach a desired result, usually through effort

examples.en: Hard work helped him achieve his goals.
examples.fa: کار سخت به او کمک کرد تا به اهدافش برسد.

examples.en: The team achieved better results than expected.
examples.fa: تیم نتایج بهتری از حد انتظار به دست آورد.

notes: "Achieve" almost always takes an object that refers to a goal, result, or standard (achieve success, achieve a goal). It is not normally used with simple physical objects (avoid "achieve a car").
